hero.subtitle: Valora works in the background and optimizes your finances — on your terms.

problem.headline1: The problem isn't a lack of savings.
problem.headline2: It's that nobody has the energy to act.
problem.body: People know what they should do — but they postpone it. Not out of ignorance, but because of friction.

stats.text: have postponed switching loans or insurance — even though they know they should.
feel guilty about not getting their finances in order.
experience high mental load around loans, insurance, and money.

problem.quote: "I've known for two years that I should do this — but I couldn't bring myself to."
problem.statsFootnote: Figures are illustrative summaries from qualitative research, not nationally representative statistics.

industry.caption: Industry problem
industry.headline2: The burden lands on the individual.

errors.noteMax: Note must be at most 500 characters

items.a: No. Valora is an autonomous financial system that optimizes your finances on top of banks and insurers.

items.q: Do I need to switch banks?
items.a: No — and sometimes, yes. You never need to switch banks to use Valora. If Valora identifies an improvement that requires a switch, it only happens after your explicit approval.

You choose what to connect and what to approve. We use strong security for data in transit and at rest, and Valora does not move money or change contracts without your confirmation. Read the privacy policy for details.
Pricing will be set at launch. Early users are prioritized.
